EditTextPreference.title: API Key
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Enter your Trading212 API key. You can generate one in Settings -> API → Generate API key. The key must have the "Unrestricted" type and have "Account data" and ALL of the "History" permissions. If you use the Trading212 debit card, you will have to manually add deposits to that card, since the API doesn't show them.

EditTextPreference.title: From what date to load transactions
EditTextPreference.dialogTitle: From what date to load transactions

CheckBoxPreference.title: "Invest spare change" enabled
CheckBoxPreference.dialogMessage: Trading212 API doesn't return the investments made with the "Invest spare change" feature. If you use the Trading212 debit card with this feature, enable this option to automatically create the rounding transactions.

CheckBoxPreference.title: "Invest cashback" enabled
CheckBoxPreference.dialogMessage: Trading212 API doesn't tell where the cashback is debited. If you use the Trading212 debit card with this feature, enable this option to put cashback into the correct account.
